title: Facebook owner Meta to buy AI chips from AMD in deal worth up to $100 billion
description: Meta Platforms will buy artificial intelligence chips from Advanced Micro Devices in a deal that will also give it the opportunity to buy up to a 10% stake of the chip company.
content:

title: Musk’s X and xAI move to repay $17.5B debt in full: Bloomberg report
description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk’s X and artificial intelligence startup xAI are preparing to repay roughly $17.5 billion in debt to the companies, including high-yield bonds redeemed at a premium, in a sweeping balance sheet reset ahead of major corporate restructuring and a potential SpaceX IPO.
content:

title: Sudhir Chaudhary Discusses the Evolution of Indian Television Journalism and AI at DNPA Conclave 2026
description: At the DNPA Conclave 2026, Sudhir Chaudhary reflects on the transformation of Indian television journalism, the rise of digital news platforms, and the impact of artificial intelligence on media production.

title: AI disinformation turns Nepal polls into 'digital battleground'
description: Parties across the political divide are tapping social media to push their agendas and woo voters, especially the young, including a surge of people registering to cast their ballot for the first time. The Election Commission says there is widespread use of hate speech and deepfake content, including videos created with readily available artificial intelligence tools purporting to show candidates insulting opponents or using obscene language.
